product.category: home fitness, web2app onboarding, personalized subscription plan
product.audience: women who want an approachable plan for fitness, body confidence, and consistency.
product.positioningPromise: Create a personalized home fitness plan around goal, body baseline, and schedule.

profile.ageRangeEvidence: Product name signals women-focused weight loss, toning, or body-confidence onboarding.

ageGroups.label: Age: 18-25
ageGroups.differentiationRequirement: youngest bracket; visibly early adult energy without looking underage for 18-25.

ageGroups.label: Age: 26-35
ageGroups.differentiationRequirement: second bracket; adult styling distinct from the youngest group for 26-35.

ageGroups.label: Age: 36-45
ageGroups.differentiationRequirement: third bracket; mature adult styling with visible age difference for 36-45.

ageGroups.label: Age: 46+
ageGroups.imageSubject: Latino or mixed-race adult woman, age 46+
ageGroups.differentiationRequirement: oldest bracket; clearly older appearance while still capable and confident for 46+.

profile.category: home fitness, web2app onboarding, personalized subscription plan
profile.audience: women who want an approachable plan for fitness, body confidence, and consistency.
profile.promise: Create a personalized home fitness plan around goal, body baseline, and schedule.

slots.displayRole: Full-bleed portal hero for the first page.
slots.backgroundPolicy: Photoreal lifestyle background, no transparency needed.
slots.styleConsistency: Premium editorial home fitness photography, trustworthy and approachable.
slots.promptBrief: Create one premium hero image for a home fitness web funnel. Show one adult woman doing guided home fitness movement in a bright minimal home or studio setting. Confident, approachable, no text, no logos, no app UI.
slots.negativePrompt: No words, logos, devices, UI screens, weapons, camouflage uniform, injuries, dark gritty scene, or crowded gym.

slots.displayRole: Four option images for age-group selection.
slots.backgroundPolicy: Perfectly plain solid white background (#FFFFFF). No gradient, no vignette, no studio sweep, no shadowed backdrop, no colored tint, no texture, no floor plane, no environmental scene. Keep the backdrop simple, seamless, and consistent across all four age option images.
slots.styleConsistency: Same camera angle, crop, lighting, athletic styling, and visual system. Upper-body or half-body crop. Include Asian, Black, White, and Latino or mixed-race representation across the four options, with clear age differences.
slots.promptBrief: Create four separate half-body portraits for age selection in a home fitness funnel on a perfectly plain solid white #FFFFFF studio background. The product target age range is 18-55, chosen by product_analysis. The four options are: Age: 18-25 (Asian adult woman, age 18-25); Age: 26-35 (Black adult woman, age 26-35); Age: 36-45 (White adult woman, age 36-45); Age: 46+ (Latino or mixed-race adult woman, age 46+). Each person wears tasteful movement-friendly clothes and has a confident friendly posture. No text, no logo.
slots.negativePrompt: No full scenes, no text, no numbers, no labels, no duplicated face across age groups, no childlike appearance, no sexualized pose, no black background, no dark background, no gradient, no vignette, no colored tint, no texture, no studio sweep, no shadowed backdrop.

items.label: Age: 18-25
items.visualBrief: Asian adult woman, age 18-25, half-body, product-relevant, confident, tasteful movement-friendly clothes.
items.differentiationRequirement: youngest bracket; visibly early adult energy without looking underage for 18-25.

items.label: Age: 26-35
items.visualBrief: Black adult woman, age 26-35, half-body, product-relevant, confident, tasteful movement-friendly clothes.
items.differentiationRequirement: second bracket; adult styling distinct from the youngest group for 26-35.

items.label: Age: 36-45
items.visualBrief: White adult woman, age 36-45, half-body, product-relevant, confident, tasteful movement-friendly clothes.
items.differentiationRequirement: third bracket; mature adult styling with visible age difference for 36-45.

items.label: Age: 46+
items.visualBrief: Latino or mixed-race adult woman, age 46+, half-body, product-relevant, confident, tasteful movement-friendly clothes.
items.differentiationRequirement: oldest bracket; clearly older appearance while still capable and confident for 46+.

slots.displayRole: Large contextual image for an intro or transition page.
slots.backgroundPolicy: Natural light training scene; no transparent requirement.
slots.styleConsistency: Same premium home fitness campaign style across intro images.
slots.promptBrief: Create a 4:3 premium home fitness image for an intro page titled "Your goal gives the plan direction". Show one adult woman in a clean modern home or studio context doing or preparing for guided home fitness movement. The image should support this message: A strong plan is not just harder exercises. It needs the right starting point, the right schedule, and a progression you can keep repeating.. No text, no logos, no app UI.
slots.negativePrompt: No words, logos, phones, screenshots, weapons, camouflage, injuries, or crowded gym.

slots.displayRole: Large contextual image for an intro or transition page.
slots.backgroundPolicy: Natural light training scene; no transparent requirement.
slots.styleConsistency: Same premium home fitness campaign style across intro images.
slots.promptBrief: Create a 4:3 premium home fitness image for an intro page titled "Your routine should fit your real week". Show one adult woman in a clean modern home or studio context doing or preparing for guided home fitness movement. The image should support this message: Most people stop because the training plan asks for a version of their week that does not exist. We will use your schedule to shape a home fitness plan that feels easier to repeat.. No text, no logos, no app UI.
slots.negativePrompt: No words, logos, phones, screenshots, weapons, camouflage, injuries, or crowded gym.

slots.displayRole: Body profile visual for summary and paywall before/after comparison.
slots.backgroundPolicy: Perfectly plain solid white background (#FFFFFF). No gradient, no vignette, no studio sweep, no shadowed backdrop, no colored tint, no texture, no floor plane, no environmental scene. Keep the backdrop simple, seamless, and consistent across all four body-state images.
slots.styleConsistency: Same adult woman identity, face, hair, outfit color, lighting, 3/4-body crop, and pose across all four variants. Only body composition changes: underweight, normal, overweight, obese.
slots.promptBrief: Create one respectful 3/4-body studio image of an adult woman in modest movement-friendly wear for a fitness summary body-state set. Crop from head to mid-thigh or just above the knees; do not show full legs or full body. Keep the person front-facing, neutral confident pose, perfectly plain solid white #FFFFFF studio background, no text, no logos.
slots.negativePrompt: No text, no labels, no shame framing, no medical imagery, no unrealistic proportions, no sexualized pose, no full-body head-to-toe crop, no feet-dominant framing, no black background, no dark background, no gradient, no vignette, no colored tint, no texture, no studio sweep, no shadowed backdrop, no busy room.
slots.runtimeUsage: Summary body visual and paywall Now/Goal comparison.

items.label: Normal
items.visualBrief: Base image: healthy normal body composition, 3/4 body crop.
items.differentiationRequirement: Neutral body composition, same face and outfit as the whole set.

items.label: Underweight
items.visualBrief: Edit same person to underweight body composition, same face and outfit.
items.differentiationRequirement: Underweight body composition without shame framing.

items.label: Overweight
items.visualBrief: Edit same person to overweight body composition, same face and outfit.
items.differentiationRequirement: Overweight body composition without changing face or clothing direction.

items.label: Obese
items.visualBrief: Edit same person to obese body composition, same face and outfit.
items.differentiationRequirement: Obese body composition without changing face or clothing direction.

slots.displayRole: Reuse two summary body images for Now and Goal comparison.
slots.styleConsistency: Same visual identity as summary body image set.
slots.promptBrief: Reuse current and target body-state images from summary.body_set.
slots.negativePrompt: Do not generate a new image for this slot.

slots.displayRole: Companion app screenshot carousel inside paywall.
slots.styleConsistency: Use source screenshots from the target App Store listing.
slots.promptBrief: Download the real App Store screenshots for Workout for Women -Lose Weight when available.
slots.negativePrompt: Do not use AI generation for real app screenshots by default.
